Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mattaniah Eytan, appeared for Plaintiff/moving party
Alber Lee, appeared for defendant/opposing party
Ruling:
HEARING HELD. Tentative Ruling adopted with modifications: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Further Responses is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as the motion seeks the production of documents responsive to Request Nos. 3-44. The motion is denied as to Request Nos. 1 and 2. The prior order, while it did not specifically address the issue of whether documents could be requested in connection with the resumption of the Lien deposition, it would be inconsistent to preclude the discovery of documents which might be relied upon in giving the allowed testimony regarding facts in support of the affirmative defenses.
The motion is denied as it seeks a referee. Plaintiffs may notice the resumption of the deposition to take place in Room 612 on Monday through Thursday during the hours 1:30-4:30 p.m. during which time the court will be available as necessary to supervise the conduct of the deposition.
All requests for sanctions are denied.

MODIFICATIONS: Deposition is limited to one afternoon.

Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
